subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Upon thee be the glory of Bahá'u'lláh, Lord of the hidden and the manifest! Thou art present before My face and art mentioned. Give thanks unto thy Lord for this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن علیک بهاء الله مولی السر و العلن امام وجه حاضری و مذکور اشکر ربک بهذا
